LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 04, MOTION TO CONTINUE ARBITRATION, CALENDAR OF MAR-13-1995, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER ARBITRATION SHALL BE COMPLETED ON OR BEFORE 4/14/95. STATUS CONFERENCE IS CONTINUED TO 6/16/95.

ARBITRATOR'S AWARD SENT TO DEFAULT SECTION

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CROSBY, MICHELLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOROWITZ, MORRIS $4,750.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,750.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS OF SUIT.
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF S.F. ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS OF SUIT.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CROSBY, MICHELLE AS TO DEFENDANT HOROWITZ, MORRIS
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CROSS COMPLAINT FILED BY HOROWITZ, MORRIS AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF S.F.
